name: EnemiesEvolve
description: Makes enemies stronger instead of more numerous. Two modes: enemy HP, damage and speed scale up each wave, or a flat multiplier for the whole run. Everything configurable with sliders (requires ModOptions).

mode.tooltip: Per wave: enemies get stronger each wave. Flat multiplier: same boost the whole run.

hp_percent_per_wave.tooltip: Per wave mode: extra enemy health per wave. 5% = 2x HP at wave 20.

damage_percent_per_wave.tooltip: Per wave mode: extra enemy damage per wave. 5% = 2x damage at wave 20.

speed_percent_per_wave.tooltip: Per wave mode: extra enemy speed per wave. Off by default - changes the game a lot.

hp_multiplier.tooltip: Flat mode: enemy health multiplier for the whole run.

damage_multiplier.tooltip: Flat mode: enemy damage multiplier for the whole run.

speed_multiplier.tooltip: Flat mode: enemy speed multiplier for the whole run. 1x = off.
